backend/main.mo: Actor storing spare parts with upload, password verification, retention checks, and stable migration support.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module passing old dataset and password into the new actor format without transformation.
feature_evidence.json: Metadata file listing implemented features, affected files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing responsibilities of various frontend components, hooks, utilities, and configuration files.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base layer defining light/dark theme color tokens and global styling variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point containing root div and script that loads the React frontend.
frontend/README.md: User-facing documentation explaining local setup, IC deployment, retention behavior, backups, and environment differences.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app wiring together header, upload, retention notice, table, error states, and backend connectivity via hooks.
frontend/src/components/AppHeader.tsx: Renders the main app header with environment badges and a Publish/Verify Live popover containing tabs and helpers.
frontend/src/components/BackendUnavailab: Shows an error card when the backend is unreachable and provides a retry button.
frontend/src/components/DatasetRetention: Displays environment-specific notices and retention status, including warnings for draft/dev and status for live.
frontend/src/components/EmptyState.tsx: Presents a centered empty state encouraging users to upload an Excel data file.
frontend/src/components/LiveSmokeTestPan: Runs and displays live deployment verification steps with statuses, environment info, and refresh capability.
frontend/src/components/PublishLiveHelpe: Guides users through generating a Live app URL, validating slugs, copying/opening the URL, and shows Live‑specific messaging.
frontend/src/components/PublishLiveHelpM: Provides a modal explaining Draft vs Live environments and step‑by‑step instructions for publishing live.
Renders a searchable spare‑parts table with debounced filtering and capped display of 100 results.
frontend/src/components/UploadCard.tsx: Handles file uploads, password‑protected import, password changes, and backup restore functionality.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches a backend actor based on Internet Identity and refreshes dependent queries when it changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBackendConnectivit: Tests backend connectivity using a lightweight query and exposes connection status and error info.
frontend/src/hooks/useDebouncedValue.ts: Provides a debounced version of a value updated after a delay.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Manages Internet Identity authentication state, login, logout, and identity persistence via context.
frontend/src/hooks/useLiveSmokeTest.ts: Generates smoke‑test steps assessing environment, UI load, backend connectivity, data availability, and persistence.
Tracks a simple unlock state and session password for maintenance actions.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder file kept for future query expansions.
frontend/src/hooks/useSparePartsData.ts: Provides React Query hooks for loading, importing, and tracking spare parts and retention status, including stable data handling during imports.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind base layers and custom CSS variables for light and dark themes with a sand/green palette.
frontend/src/lib/backendError.ts: Normalizes backend errors into user-friendly messages and provides helpers to detect connectivity and password errors.
frontend/src/lib/backup/sparePartsBackup: Handles saving, loading, clearing, exporting, and checking localStorage backups for spare parts data with BigInt conversion.
frontend/src/lib/excel/parseSpareParts.t: Parses an XLSX file into SparePart objects by identifying common column headers and converting values like stock counts.
frontend/src/lib/publishLive/environment: Detects Live or Draft environments based on hostname patterns and provides helpers for environment labels and hostname access.
frontend/src/lib/publishLive/slug.ts: Validates, normalizes, and suggests domain slugs and generates Live URLs for publish-live functionality.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with QueryClient and Internet Identity providers and loads global styles.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS config enabling dark mode, defining content paths, and extending theme with custom colors, fonts, shadows, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks project state, existing features, and pending requests related to dataset restoration and providing self-managed code.
